calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-22-2005 Dismissal - No Appearance

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-20-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Settlement conference held. No appearance for plaintiff/cross-defendant. Cause does not settle. Trial Date maintained. Judge: Julie Tang; Clerk: Craig Blackstone; not reported (D. 303)

Defendant'S Motion For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-22-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Roger R. Rubin, Esq., appeared for Defendant Andrew Smith; no other appearances.
HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. The motion for terminating sanctions is granted. No opposition has been filed. The Court finds that plaintiff failed to appear for deposition and that further orders would not result in compliance. Order signed in open court. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Mtn For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-09-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's motion for monetary sanctions is granted. No opposition has been filed. The Court finds that plaintiff has repeatedly failed to appear at deposition. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $651.15 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. The motion for terminating sanctions is continued to August 22, 2005. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-27-2005 Continued To Sep-26-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-16-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Peter Chao, Esq., for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar/fee paid. Proceedings reported by: Carl Sauceda, CSR#2031. (212)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-27-2005 Continued To Sep-20-05 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 303

MOTION To Be Relieved As Counsel-Civil
Off Calendar May-25-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Peter Chao, Esq. of Chao & Lopez Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel-Civil (for PLAINTIFF MARK BARQUERA).
APPEARANCE: Peter Chao, Esq. of Chao & Lopez 291-8887 moving to be relieved as counsel for pltf Mark Barquera; pltf Mark Barquera also present.
RULING: The Court held an in-camera hearing in chambers. Court deemed this a confidential proceeding. Court orders this record sealed, to not be opened without an order of the Court. Argued and the Court granted the motion subject to/pending an order shortening time on a motion to continue the trial for at least two months. Order signed. (302/REQ/ju) Court Reporter Beldon Yee, CSR #2647
